title: Salesforce Account and Contact backend-first contract

current_ui_boundary: Client > account section may read GET /api/crm/accounts after route tests pass
Client > contact section may read GET /api/crm/contacts after route tests pass
Client > account section may call POST /api/crm/accounts after VC-SF-B-W01-API-002 passes
Client > contact section may call POST /api/crm/contacts after VC-SF-B-W01-API-004 passes
Client > account and contact sections may call tested PATCH routes for CRM runtime facade records only
No Client UI merge action may appear before merge route tests exist

route_policy_contract.service_boundary: CRM runtime Account facade create with Master Data-safe projection boundary
CRM runtime Contact facade create with Master Data-safe ContactPoint projection boundary
CRM runtime Account facade allowlisted field patch; canonical Master Data Organization patch remains blocked
CRM runtime Contact facade allowlisted field patch; canonical Master Data Person/ContactPoint patch remains blocked

account_facade.implemented_write_boundary: POST /api/crm/accounts writes CRM runtime Account facade records only; Organization and ClientGroup canonical writes remain future Master Data work
safe_output_rules: registration_number exposed only through normalized safe field policy

contact_facade.implemented_write_boundary: POST /api/crm/contacts writes CRM runtime Contact facade records only; Person, ContactPoint, and Relationship canonical writes remain future Master Data work
safe_output_rules: duplicate email returns review warning rather than silent merge

verification_cases.requirement: GET /api/crm/accounts returns allow, denied, and review_required safe envelopes before Client UI can read it
POST /api/crm/accounts writes a CRM runtime Account facade, emits audit evidence, blocks direct Matter shortcuts, persists safely, and supports idempotency
GET /api/crm/contacts returns Person and ContactPoint safe projections with count leak prevention

POST /api/crm/contacts writes a CRM runtime Contact facade, emits audit evidence, blocks raw contact values and Matter shortcuts, persists safely, supports idempotency, and returns duplicate ContactPoint fingerprint review without automatic merge
GET /api/crm/accounts/:id/contacts trims relationship endpoints by permission
POST /api/crm/duplicate-reviews produces review evidence without merging records automatically

PATCH /api/crm/accounts/:id updates only CRM runtime Account facade allowlisted fields, audits the patch, persists safely, supports idempotency, blocks canonical Master Data records, and blocks registration/Matter shortcut fields

PATCH /api/crm/contacts/:id updates only CRM runtime Contact facade allowlisted fields, audits the patch, persists safely, supports idempotency, blocks canonical Master Data records, and blocks raw contact values/Matter shortcut fields
Client account and contact UI may expose tested POST and PATCH routes for CRM runtime facade records; merge actions remain hidden until backend route tests pass

evidence_gates: packages/master-data/test/runtime-services.test.js proves service-level duplicate, relationship, and ContactPoint rules
apps/api/test/cmp-r4-g6-crm-intake.test.js proves mounted read, Account create, Contact create, Account/Contact patch, and duplicate-review route envelopes
Playwright Client Account/Contact read QA proves tested read routes are visible in the Client workspace
Playwright Client Account create QA proves tested Account write route is visible in the Client workspace
Playwright Client Contact create QA proves tested Contact write route is visible in the Client workspace
Playwright Client Account patch QA proves tested Account patch route is visible in the Client workspace
Playwright Client Contact patch QA proves tested Contact patch route is visible in the Client workspace
Hermes MCP remains check-only and cannot authorize production, deployment, final approval, or enterprise trust claims

owner_decisions.decision: Salesforce Account maps to Law Firm OS Organization plus ClientGroup facade
Salesforce Contact maps to Law Firm OS Person plus ContactPoint facade
Duplicate and merge review thresholds are owned by master-data governance

blocked_until: CRM merge execution route remains human-governed and audit/rollback tested
Canonical Master Data Organization/ClientGroup/Person/ContactPoint write migration remains a later owner decision
